steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which statement the author would most likely agree with. The answer must be directly supported by the passage — not inferred beyond what is stated.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It occurred over a long period of time and probably had multiple causes.': The passage states mass extinctions "unfold over thousands or millions of years" and that "multiple factors drove widespread species loss." Both parts are directly supported. ✓
  • Choice B — 'It likely involved the extinction of more species than is typically believed.': The passage says about 75% of species died off but never claims this number is underestimated. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It is hard to detect in Earth's fossil or geological records.': The passage does not mention fossil or geological records at all. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It was discovered only recently and is poorly understood.': The passage says nothing about when the extinction was discovered or how well it is understood. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
